facebook.caption:
POV: you took a wrong turn in Dương Đông and found a whole sports scene nobody told you about.

Duong Dong Lake sits right in the middle of Phu Quoc's main town. 4.1 stars. 64 reviews. Most tourists drive straight past it heading to the beach.

Local activity spot. Outdoor workouts. A reason to actually leave the resort before noon.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walked into Dương Đông looking for coffee. Found this lake sports spot instead. Phu Quoc delivers in weird ways.

instagram.caption: Took a wrong turn in Dương Đông. Found a local sports lake most tourists never see. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Not the beach. Not a resort. Just Phu Quoc locals doing their thing at Duong Dong Lake.

tiktok.caption: Nobody talks about this Phu Quoc lake. Right in the middle of town. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel #TravelTips
